summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Platform Admin new pages and role-based access control - Iteration 10. All 13 tests passed (100%). Platform Admin can access 5 new pages (Schools, Users, Reports, Notifications, Settings) and is correctly blocked from school-specific pages (Schedule, Students, Classes). School Principal can access all school management pages.
passed_tests: Platform Admin login - redirects to /admin dashboard
Platform Admin CAN access /admin/schools - Schools management page
Platform Admin CAN access /admin/users - Users management page
Platform Admin CAN access /admin/reports - Reports & Analytics page
Platform Admin CAN access /notifications - Notifications page
Platform Admin CAN access /settings - Platform Settings page
Platform Admin CANNOT access /admin/schedule - correctly redirects to /admin
Platform Admin CANNOT access /admin/students - correctly redirects to /admin
Platform Admin CANNOT access /admin/classes - correctly redirects to /admin
School Principal login - redirects to /school dashboard
School Principal CAN access /admin/schedule - Schedule page
School Principal CAN access /admin/students - Students page
School Principal CAN access /admin/classes - Classes page
critical_code_review_comments: Routes in App.js correctly implement role-based access control using ProtectedRoute component
Platform Admin routes (/admin/schools, /admin/users, /admin/reports) only allow 'platform_admin' role
School management routes (/admin/schedule, /admin/students, /admin/classes) only allow 'school_principal' and 'school_sub_admin' roles
Sidebar.jsx correctly filters menu items based on user role
All 5 new Platform Admin pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Pages load correctly with proper Arabic RTL layout
seed_data_creation: Using existing test accounts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Admin role-based access control is fully functional. 5 new pages created: PlatformSchoolsPage, PlatformUsersPage, PlatformReportsPage, PlatformNotificationsPage, PlatformSettingsPage. Platform Admin sidebar shows 6 menu items (Overview, Schools, Users, Reports, Notifications, Settings). School Principal sidebar shows 9 menu items (Overview, Teachers, Students, Classes, Subjects, Schedule, Reports, Notifications, Settings). Access control correctly blocks Platform Admin from school-specific pages.
